title: Mini Food Farms
description: Get all the food you want! We're starting off the menu with some healthy apples (there are even shiny ones)!
body:
# Mini Food Farms
Welcome to Mini Food Farms!

Want to throw a party but you're short on food? Than this is the data pack for YOU! Get infinite refills on your food supplies, whenever you want!

![Mini Food Farms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e60bc547622b31576a1606f555a3a28888121812.png)

<details>
<summary>Building Guide</summary>

**The base for all Mini Farms is built by placing a dropper facing up and putting an item frame on it's side.**

<details>
<summary>Mini Cooked Food Farms</summary>

Place in the item frame the cooked food you'd like to get from the mini farm and it will generate it for you!

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mini Crop Farms</summary>


<details>
<summary>Mini Apple Farm</summary>

Put a golden apple in the item frame and place a oak log on top of the dropper. Enjoy the infinite apples!

![Mini Apple Farm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c27fc8cccc5b32c76e295ac27453b46c387b8401.png)

</details>


Mini Carrot Farms
- Put a golden carrot in the item frame.

Mini Potato & Baked Potato Farm
- Put a potato in the item frame.
- If you want baked potatoes:
  - Pit a baked Potato in the item frame and a smoker on top of the dropper.

Mini Melon Farm
- Put a glistering melon slice in the item frame and a melon on top.

Mini Beetroot Farm
- Put a beetroot in the item frame.

Mini Wheat Farm
- Put wheat in the item frame and a hay bale on top of the dropper.



</details>



</details>
